name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Elevated COM Object
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Elevated COM Object on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of dllhost.exe

when the event matches Parent Command (custom) matches any of expressions /Processid:\{(D2E7041B-2927-42FB-8E9F-7CE93B6DC937|3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7|3E000D72-A845-4CD9-BD83-80C07C3B881F)\}
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: UAC Bypass - Elevated COM Object on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Elevated Process (Windows)
AND when the event matches Parent Process Name (custom) is any of dllhost.exe

AND when the event matches Parent Command (custom) matches any of expressions /Processid:\{(D2E7041B-2927-42FB-8E9F-7CE93B6DC937|3E5FC7F9-9A51-4367-9063-A120244FBEC7|3E000D72-A845-4CD9-BD83-80C07C3B881F)\}
